'''''Trailblazer''''' was the name of [[Reidi Artom]]'s [[Scout/Legends|scout]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]]. She came to own it after having stowed away on it. It was attacked, and the owner killed. Artom repaired it, flew it to a [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]], and registered it under her own name.

{{Ship-stub}}
